sections.paragraph:
Original: כּעשׂ כּעס

Transliteration: ka‛as ka‛aś

Phonetic: kah'-as

BDB Definition:

  1. anger, vexation, provocation, grief
    1. vexation
      1. of men
      2. of God
    2. vexation, grief, frustration

Origin: from H3707

TWOT entry: 1016a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
